theme: Git jamoa — remote, push/pull, PR, conflict yechish (to'liq kun)

tasks.title: Markaziy repo (bare)
tasks.why: bare repo — GitHub'dagi markaziy repo mantig'i (ishchi nusxasiz tarix).
steps: Ishchi papkangga o't:  cd ~/devops/days/day-11/work
'Remote' yarat:  git init --bare remote.git

tasks.title: Klonla (clone)
steps: git clone remote.git work-copy

tasks.title: Commit + push
steps: cd work-copy && git config user.email w@w.uz && git config user.name w
echo readme > README.md && git add . && git commit -m c1
Remote'ga yubor:  git push origin HEAD

tasks.title: Remote'larni ko'r
tasks.why: git remote -v — qaysi remote'ga ulanganini ko'rsatadi.
steps: cd work-copy && git remote -v > ../remotes.txt

tasks.title: Boshqa nusxa sinxron
tasks.why: Boshqa klon push qilingan ishni ko'radi (jamoa sinxroni).
steps: cd ~/devops/days/day-11/work && git clone remote.git clone2

tasks.title: Conflict yarat
tasks.why: Ikki branch bir qatorni o'zgartirsa — conflict. Avval uni yuzaga keltir.
steps: cd work-copy && echo 'A' > shared.txt && git add . && git commit -m base
git checkout -b other && echo 'B' > shared.txt && git add . && git commit -m bch
git checkout - && echo 'C' > shared.txt && git add . && git commit -m cch
git merge other    # ← CONFLICT chiqadi (shu kerak)

tasks.title: Conflict'ni yech
tasks.why: Conflict belgilarini olib, to'g'ri variantni qoldirib, commit qilish.
steps: shared.txt ni ochib, <<<<<<< === >>>>>>> belgilarini O'CHIR, bitta variant qoldir
Masalan:  echo 'resolved' > shared.txt
Yakunla:  git add shared.txt && git commit -m 'conflict resolved'

tasks.title: PR oqimi (branch → merge)
tasks.why: PR mantig'i: feature branch'ni asosiyга merge qilish.
steps: cd work-copy && git checkout -b feat2 && echo yangilik > feat2.txt && git add . && git commit -m f2
git checkout - && git merge feat2

tasks.title: Day-10 .gitignore
steps: cd work-copy && echo '*.tmp' > .gitignore && touch junk.tmp
Tekshir:  git status   (junk.tmp ko'rinmasligi kerak)
tasks.check: cd $LAB/work-copy && grep -q tmp .gitignore && ! git status --porcelain | grep -q junk.tmp

tasks.title: Day-8 skript + git
tasks.why: Day-8 skript: repo holatini ko'rsatadigan skript.
steps: cd ~/devops/days/day-11/work && mkdir -p cb
cb/status.sh yoz:  cd work-copy && echo "Commits: $(git rev-list --count HEAD)"
Ishlat:  bash cb/status.sh

tasks.title: Jamoa repo qur
steps: cd ~/devops/days/day-11/work
git init --bare team.git && git clone team.git teamwork
cd teamwork && git config user.email t@t.uz && git config user.name t

tasks.title: Ishla (branch + merge)
steps: cd teamwork && echo app > app.txt && git add . && git commit -m init
git checkout -b feature && echo 'yangi funksiya' >> app.txt && git add . && git commit -m feat
git checkout - && git merge feature

tasks.title: Remote'ga yubor
tasks.why: Yakuniy: ishni markaziy repo'ga push qilish.
steps: cd teamwork && git push origin HEAD

tasks.title: Kun xulosasi
steps: conflict nima uchun yuzaga keladi va uni qanday yechishni ustozга ayt
